title: C002: Add container image CI workflow
summary: Review #5 covers incremental changes addressing greptile-apps[bot] review #4 feedback: null/empty guards for yq output in both build-service-images and smoke-test jobs, a sync comment cross-referencing the duplicated tag derivation logic, and three new test functions validating these additions. All 75 verification tests pass. YAML validates. Changes are minimal, focused, and correct.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (75/75 in verify_build_images_workflow.sh)
Edge cases covered (null yq output, empty yq output, missing source-ref key)
Both instances of duplicated logic have dedicated test coverage

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (shell test structure with PASS/FAIL counters)
Follows GHA workflow SPDX header and structure convention
No code duplication introduced (guards are at distinct call sites)
Env vars used for matrix values in run: blocks (expression injection defense)

security_checklist.item: No direct ${{ }} interpolation in run: blocks (expression injection safe)
yq output validated before downstream consumption (fail-fast on null/empty)
GITHUB_TOKEN scoped via job-level permissions (packages:write only where needed)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible (inline null guards, sync comment)
No scope creep (only addresses review #4 feedback)

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Tag derivation duplication is inherent GHA limitation (separate runners), mitigated by sync comment + tests

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early (null guard exits with ::error:: annotation before downstream steps)
Both yq call sites guarded consistently

defensive_checklist.item: yq output validated against both empty string and literal 'null'
Error messages include service name and file path for debuggability
